title: stelis sobrina
intro: Stelis sobrina, also known as the "Purple Tooth-ache Plant" or "Stelis", is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of toothaches, gum inflammation, and other oral health issues due to its analgesic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis sobrina include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and prevention of infections, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis sobrina often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and stems, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or poultices for topical application.
